hook.summary: A continuous stream of colorful, patterned marbles rolls across a lush forest background.
hook.visual_action: Marbles roll in a curved path from left to right, filling the screen.

scene_flow: Introduction of the game logo and a 'PLAY NOW' button over a forest backdrop.
A line of colorful marbles begins to roll onto the screen from the left.
The marble chain extends and follows a winding path across the center of the frame.
The sequence loops as more marbles continue to enter the scene.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle game players who enjoy marble-shooter mechanics and vibrant, fantasy-themed aesthetics.
